# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is an institute-worthy preprint with real benchmark construction and measured evaluation results.

## Why

The excerpt describes a formal arXiv manuscript that introduces SWE-EVO, a concrete benchmark built from seven mature open-source Python projects with 48 tasks, average file-span and test-suite statistics, and reported experimental outcomes including a 21% versus 65% performance gap and a proposed Fix Rate metric. That is real empirical substance, not commentary.

## Limits
